meaning: adj.鑰冭檻杩囩殑,缁嗘兂杩囩殑
examples: Drinking is not advised during pregnancy.
Jo was advised to learn to control herself.
He was advised to reduce his alcohol consumption.
Travellers should be advised, however, that exploring the complex involves a lot of stairs.
They also advised washing shoes and bicycle and pushchair wheels after a visit to the park.
